chunks.text: 2024 Synopsys renewal in progress | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar 2024 Synopsys renewal in progress If you use Synopsys software on EECS Instructional or research systems, you may be seeing an alert that

research systems, you may be seeing an alert that the current licensing expires on September 25. Staff are already in progress of renewing Synopsys licensing, and our vendor representative is working to get us new license files as soon as possible.

to get us new license files as soon as possible. UPDATE [2024-09-27 | larsrohr ] While an updated Synopsys license file was installed on Sept 18th, it included both the now-expired licenses as well as the new, active licenses. This led to continued

s the new, active licenses. This led to continued expiration warnings through Sept 25, and now creates warnings of an expired license for most Synopsys tools before the tool starts properly under the new license. Staff are working on obtaining a revi

new license. Staff are working on obtaining a revised license file. UPDATE [2024-10-01 | larsrohr ] A revised license file no longer includes the expired licenses, so the expiration warnings are gone. Resolved as of 2024-10-01 12:00 Primary Sidebar I

Resolved as of 2024-10-01 12:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
